parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Toggle whether the OAK Select cooks.

parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: OAK Device CHOP
parameters.description: An OAK Device running a depthai pipeline.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.label: Stream
parameters.description: The name of the stream to be received.

parameters.name: queuesize
parameters.label: Queue Size
parameters.description: For memory efficiency, this parameter controls the number of messages TouchDesigner reuses when receiving messages from OAK. See "Queue Size" below.

parameters.name: maxitems
parameters.label: Max Items
parameters.description: This parameter helps the OAK Select output a consistent number of channels. When running an image detection pipeline, the number of detected items will vary from frame to frame, but we want TouchDesig

parameters.name: outputformat
parameters.label: Output Format
parameters.description: The default option "Items As Separate Channels" enables time-slicing while "Items as Separate Samples" does not. If the stream is one which automatically fills in the , then "Items as Separate Samples

parameters.name: firstsample
parameters.label: Use First Sample Only
parameters.description: Only use the most recently received message with the OAK Select . For example, for an IMU stream which is sending very high-frame rate data, toggling this parameter will only show the latest sample.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the . The default sample rate is .

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: Specifies the which holds the callbacks.

parameters.name: setuppars
parameters.label: Setup Parameters
parameters.description: Clicking the button runs the setupParameters() callback function.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
